message:
chore: update dependencies to latest versions (bd-39fv)

Updated 19 packages via cargo update:
- cc: 1.2.53 -> 1.2.54
- proc-macro2: 1.0.105 -> 1.0.106
- quote: 1.0.43 -> 1.0.44
- time: 0.3.45 -> 0.3.46
- uuid: 1.19.0 -> 1.20.0
- zerocopy: 0.8.33 -> 0.8.34
- and more...

Verified: cargo check, clippy, test all pass ✅

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
